full_text:
Karen Honey

Executive Editor

Cancer Immunology Research

Dear Dr Honey,

I am pleased to share a revised version of our Manuscript titled “Ex Vivo Immuno-Oncology Platform Reveals Spatial T Cell Infiltration Patterns Linked to ATR Inhibition Responses in High-Grade Serous Ovarian Cancer”.

We greatly appreciate your time in handling our manuscript. We have addressed all of the reviewer comments during our revision of the manuscript, and hope that the manuscript can be now reconsidered for publication in Cancer Immunology Research.

Sincerely,

Anniina Färkkilä, MD PhD, Assistant Professor in Translational Gynecologic Oncology

Specialist in Obstetrics and Gynecology

Research Program in Systems Oncology &
Department of Obstetrics and Gynecology
University of Helsinki and Helsinki University Hospital
00014 University of Helsinki
anniina.farkkila@helsinki.fi
+358505967786
